mechanism_narrative: Higher federal funds rates increase corporate borrowing costs and equity discount rates, directly suppressing valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20-day returns exceed 55% when FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A unemployment rate dropping below 4.0% signals a tightening labor market that boosts corporate earnings expectations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in greater than 50% of instances when UNRATE crosses below 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand growth, which translates into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce a positive return probability above 55% over 60 days.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the index of industrial production reflects weakening manufacturing output and supply-side contraction, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines are followed by positive 5-day returns in greater than 60% of cases during tightening cycles.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI decline below 0.2% confirms disinflation, allowing equity markets to price in lower future rate hikes and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL drops below 0.2% but 20-day forward returns remain negative in greater than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising unemployment and falling total nonfarm payrolls signals labor market deterioration and recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The PAYEMS-UNRATE divergence yields positive 20-day returns in greater than 50% of triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth above trend reflects robust aggregate demand and corporate revenue expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth above 2.5% annualized fails to generate a positive return probability exceeding 55% over 60 days.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production surpassing the 2017 baseline of 100.0 indicates full capacity utilization and strong supply-side momentum, triggering positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO greater than 100.0 is followed by negative 5-day returns in greater than 55% of instances.
